_comment: Official Salesforce DX MCP server (@salesforce/mcp, Beta), local stdio. This server is READ+WRITE: even the pinned `data` toolset includes record DML, so read-only is NOT enforced by the toolset pin — it is enforced by a READ-ONLY PERMISSION SET on the CLI-authenticated org user (see SETUP.md), which is why read_only_mechanism is credential-only. --toolsets=data just narrows the loaded surface (drops metadata/Apex/devops tools). Auth reuses the Salesforce CLI org — run `sf org login web` as a read-only user first. Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
